routes.title: WCWD — Worldcoin, World Chain, WLD & World ID Tools
routes.description: Unofficial Worldcoin toolkit for World Chain monitoring, WLD market context, Sell Impact checks, ecosystem browsing, and World ID builder workflows.

routes.title: WCWD — About This Unofficial Worldcoin Toolkit
routes.description: About WCWD, an independent Worldcoin, World Chain, and World ID toolkit with best-effort data, disclaimers, privacy notes, and a no-background-collection operating model.

routes.title: WCWD — Support This Free Worldcoin Toolkit
routes.description: Support WCWD's free Worldcoin, World Chain, WLD, and World ID tools, including public API maintenance, manual data review, and bounded read-only history.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Tools
routes.description: World Chain tool hub for Monitor, Sell Impact, Ecosystem, Oracles, and Paymaster utilities.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Monitor for WLD, Gas, Activity & History
routes.description: Monitor World Chain health, WLD market context, gas, sampled activity, alerts, events, and bounded read-only history using WCWD's best-effort summaries.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Sell Impact & Liquidity Risk Tool
routes.description: Estimate World Chain token sell impact, conservative max sell size, pool depth, liquidity risk, and rough exit conditions using public pool snapshots.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Ecosystem Directory
routes.description: Browse World Chain tokens, dApps, infrastructure, oracle-related entries, and curated ecosystem links from WCWD's best-effort directory.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Token Heatmap
routes.description: Treemap view of World Chain token volume, liquidity, and momentum. Data availability and source status are shown explicitly.

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Oracle Feed Tester
routes.description: Check an AggregatorV3 feed through WCWD's fixed same-origin World Chain RPC path without caller-selected server fetches.

application.name: WCWD World Chain Oracle Feed Tester

routes.title: WCWD — World Chain Paymaster Preflight
routes.description: Check World Chain RPC readiness through WCWD and prepare a local sponsor endpoint test template without server-side proxying.

routes.title: WCWD — World ID Builder Tools
routes.description: World ID builder hub for integration snippets, proof debugging, and verifier request testing.

routes.title: WCWD — World ID Integration Wizard
routes.description: Generate frontend and backend template snippets for World ID integration workflows.

routes.title: WCWD — World ID Proof Debugger
routes.description: Inspect and diagnose World ID proof JSON structure ephemerally in the browser.

routes.title: WCWD — World ID Verifier Playground
routes.description: Generate verifier request examples and test browser-based World ID proof requests with clear CORS feedback.
